reasons: Angela can support Fanny during high-risk dives without needing to physically keep up with her cable movement.
Fanny benefits from Angela's protection when she commits into the enemy backline for a burst window.

proof.summary: Angela follows Fanny's dive through her attachment mechanic, adding protection and sustain during Fanny's burst window.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches when Fanny is ready to commit.
Fanny has enough energy and wall path to exit after the dive.
failureCases: Fanny runs out of energy after Angela joins.
Enemy suppression or airborne control interrupts Fanny's movement.

reasons: Kaja can lock a priority target, giving Fanny a predictable target to burst without chasing through the whole fight.
Fanny can use her mobility to follow Kaja's target lock and finish the isolated enemy quickly.

proof.summary: Kaja isolates and controls a target, while Fanny uses her mobility and burst to finish the target quickly.
worksBestWhen: Kaja locks a squishy target near terrain Fanny can cable through.
Fanny waits for the confirmed lock before diving.
failureCases: Fanny's cable path is blocked or energy is too low.

reasons: Franco can create a single-target catch, allowing Fanny to quickly finish the isolated enemy.
Fanny can stay out of vision until Franco confirms the pickoff angle.

proof.summary: Franco starts the pickoff, while Fanny follows with fast burst once the target is controlled or pulled out of position.
worksBestWhen: Franco catches a target near a wall path.
Fanny waits outside vision until the catch lands.
failureCases: Fanny enters before Franco confirms the catch.

reasons: Mathilda can support aggressive movement and provide extra safety around Fanny's dive routes.
Fanny benefits from additional mobility and protection options when coordinating a fast entry or exit.

proof.summary: Mathilda improves dive coordination by adding mobility and protection options around Fanny's fast entry or exit.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda supports Fanny's intended route instead of forcing a separate engage.
Fanny keeps enough energy to disengage after using the extra support.
failureCases: The team cannot follow Fanny's fast tempo.
Enemy hard control waits for Fanny's landing path.

reasons: Floryn can support Fanny from anywhere on the map, which fits Fanny's high-mobility dive pattern.
Global healing can help Fanny survive after a risky cable dive, especially when she needs to exit after bursting a target.

proof.summary: Fanny can dive far from her team, while Floryn's global heal can still reach her during the commit or escape window.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves global heal for Fanny's real dive timing.
Fanny has enough energy to exit after receiving the heal.
Fanny targets isolated or fragile enemies instead of diving into full crowd control.
failureCases: Fanny is suppressed or chain-controlled before the heal matters.
Fanny runs out of energy after committing.
Floryn's global heal is used too early or on another fight.
